# Elan The Presidential

> Elan The Presidential is a 30-acre ultra-luxury residential project by Elan Group in Sector 106, Dwarka Expressway, Gurugram, Haryana, India. The project offers 866 residences of 3, 4 and 5 BHK apartments across 8 high-rise towers, master-designed by UHA London and constructed by Leighton. Starting ₹5 Crore. Possession October 2027. RERA GGM/626/358/2022/101.

## Key Facts

- **Project name**: Elan The Presidential
- **Developer**: Elan Group (Elan Limited)
- **Location**: Sector 106, Dwarka Expressway, Gurugram, Haryana 122006, India
- **Project area**: 30+ acres, 75% open landscaped greens
- **Total residences**: 866
- **Towers**: 8 high-rise residential towers
- **Configurations**: 3 BHK, 4 BHK + Servant, 5 BHK + Servant, Signature Penthouse
- **Unit sizes**:
  - 3 BHK: 2,500 sq ft
  - 4 BHK + SQ: ~4,000 sq ft
  - 5 BHK + SQ: ~4,499 sq ft
  - Signature Penthouse: up to 6,500 sq ft
- **Starting price**: ₹5 Crore (for 3 BHK); larger units on request
- **Payment plan**: 30:30:40 construction-linked
- **Possession**: October 2027
- **RERA number**: GGM/626/358/2022/101
- **RERA authority**: Haryana Real Estate Regulatory Authority (HRERA)
- **Architect**: UHA London (United Kingdom)
- **Contractor**: Leighton (international)
- **Certification**: IGBC Green Rated
- **Contact**: +91 94122 34688
- **Official site**: https://www.elanthepresidential.com/
- **Developer site**: https://www.elan.co.in/

## Location & Connectivity

- IGI Airport, New Delhi: ~20 minutes drive
- Cyber Hub / Udyog Vihar business district: ~25 minutes drive
- Ambience Mall: ~15 minutes drive
- Medanta Hospital: ~15 minutes drive
- The Heritage School: ~12 minutes drive
- NH-48 (Delhi–Jaipur Expressway): direct access
- Dwarka Sector 21 Metro: ~15 minutes drive
- Central Delhi: ~35 minutes drive

## Amenities

Olympic-sized infinity swimming pool with floating sauna, podium-level clubhouse, billionaire-grade concierge, multi-cuisine restaurant, professional gym, yoga pavilion, spa, tennis court, badminton court, squash court, horse-riding arena, shooting range, dedicated children's zones, landscaped central park, amphitheatre, private theatre, banquet hall, cafe, wine & cigar lounge, library, business centre, guest suites, creche, pet park, EV charging stations, 5-tier security, CCTV surveillance, private elevator per apartment, VRV/VRF climate control, home automation pre-wiring, rainwater harvesting, STP, solar water heating.

## Residence Specifications

- **3 BHK · 2,500 sq ft**: Spacious living-dining, three en-suite bedrooms, modular kitchen with utility balcony, powder room, private elevator lobby.
- **4 BHK + SQ · ~4,000 sq ft**: Grand formal living, four en-suite bedrooms, family lounge, premium modular kitchen, staff room with separate entry, multiple balconies.
- **5 BHK + SQ · ~4,499 sq ft**: Signature residence, private entry foyer, formal and informal living, five en-suite bedrooms, master suite with walk-in wardrobe, gourmet kitchen, private terrace.
- **Signature Penthouse · up to 6,500 sq ft**: Duplex layouts, private terraces, exclusive top-floor residences.

## About Elan Group

Elan Group (Elan Limited) is a leading Delhi NCR real estate developer known for landmark luxury residential, commercial and retail projects in Gurugram, including Elan Miracle, Elan Town Centre, Elan Epic, Elan Mercado and Elan The Mark. Elan The Presidential is the group's flagship super-luxury residential statement in Sector 106. The group's next flagship is Elan The Emperor (Sector 106, 50 acres, 4 & 5 BHK from ₹10.45 Cr, possession September 2032, RERA GGM/902/634/2025/05).

## Related Projects (disambiguation)

- **Elan The Presidential** (this page): 3/4/5 BHK from ₹5 Cr, 30 acres, possession Oct 2027, RERA GGM/626/358/2022/101
- **Elan The Emperor**: 4/5 BHK from ₹10.45 Cr, 50 acres, possession Sep 2032, RERA GGM/902/634/2025/05
- Both are by Elan Group in Sector 106, Gurugram, but they are distinct projects.

## Disclaimer

Information is indicative and subject to change. Prices, sizes and specifications should be verified directly with the developer and on the HRERA portal (haryanarera.gov.in) before booking.
